name: USPS package redelivery fee
description: Fake USPS text claiming a package is held and requires a small fee to release.
example: USPS: Your package is being held at our facility. A redelivery fee of $2.99 is required. Pay here: usps-redelivery[.]com/pay
red_flags: USPS does not text customers asking for fees
Fee amount is small to seem harmless
URL is not usps.com (real USPS domain)
